rows:
History: Men, Faugh! They are walking violent egos, they need to be controlled.
Madeleine was born and raised in Rotterdam in the late 1870’s, daughter of a wealthy merchant.  She was raised indulgently and educated quite well, her father had plans to marry her above her station and elevate the family.  She was known to attend salons where radical ideas were discussed, and soon fell into a free thinking crowd that even went so far as to push for voting rights for women.  She latched onto this cause, currently battling her father over his ideas of an arranged marriage.  Madeleine spent her time getting deeper into the cause (dutch women vote in 1919), and took part in the League of Nations efforts to spread the franchise.  She toured Europe for years, taking part in rallies and debates, and speeches.  She found herself in Poland in 1928, when she was pulled from a train and raped repeatedly for days, several men saw it, and several men who did not partake in the rapes, knew what was going on in the back of the village tavern.  None did anything.  She came to with the visage of a wizened old crone leaning over her.  “ I can kill you dear, or I can make you strong enough to protect women from this, it is your choice my dear?”  She took strength and protection and has never looked back.  Her strength is her conviction, and yes she has met men and vampires alike who support and do not denigrate women, but they are never the ones in charge.  Those in power always put women “in their place” and are users.  Madeleine heard about what was happening in LA and of two opportunities.  The first being that for the first time, Clan Tremere could be advocating a Female led Chantry that was an actual important city.  A new court means a new outlook more than a third of the vamps coming to LA are female (she has helped spread the word to as many women as possible), she has the chance to urge a female court, or at least controlled. Sire: Bronislawa, Crone of Zamosc  Embrace : 1928 (Poland
Angela Malone (Brujah)  You met this young vamp a year ago, and made sure she heard about the activity in LA, she has fire and determination.  She can be LA’s new female blood.
Zhao "John" Leji (Ventrue) Brothel owner and Pimp, he is a user through and through.  You and others who think like you do have had him in their sights for years.
Paulina Catalanotti (Brujah) You have heard of her, an elder with Stockholm syndrome, abused by men and still sitting at their knees like a dog.  Lets hope she can change and develop some spirit.
Dr. Valeire Penza (Malk) a key researcher in the effects of the embrace on the psych, maybe she can be of assistance in psyche profiles and therapy to strengthen the female vamps minds.
